title: koeleria spicata subsp. cumingii
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. cumingii, also known as Cuming's June grass or Cuming's koeleria, is a subspecies of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. cumingii include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
